---
title: "CV"
---

**Position** · Postdoctoral researcher, MRC Laboratory of Molecular Biology,
University of Cambridge (Cardona group).

[Download full CV (PDF)](assets/scott-wilson-cv.pdf)

## Education
::: {.lead-block}
### PhD, Neuroscience — University of Cambridge (MRC LMB)
2021–2026. Thesis: *On the Individuality of a Brain: Connectomic and Transcriptomic
Plasticity in the Drosophila Larva*.
:::
::: {.lead-block}
### MSci Biological Sciences (Genetics) — UCL
First Class Honours. Research year at the Francis Crick Institute (Luscombe lab).
:::

## Also
::: {.lead-block}
Santa Fe Institute working group — *Assessing Representation in Minds and Artificial
Systems* (selected 1 of 12; with Melanie Mitchell and David Krakauer).
:::
